title: satureja rotundifolia
intro: Satureja rotundifolia, also known as the round-leaved savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Satureja rotundifolia include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Satureja rotundifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
